summary_prompt: Provide a brief status of lead intelligence including: email sending capacity, lead pipeline status, platform health, domain health, and any critical issues affecting lead sourcing or campaign capacity.

key_metrics.name: Daily Email Capacity
key_metrics.description: Total emails that can be sent today across all domains

key_metrics.name: Capacity Utilization
key_metrics.description: Percentage of sending capacity currently in use

key_metrics.name: Leads Sourced This Week
key_metrics.description: New leads imported from all platforms

key_metrics.name: Email Validation Rate
key_metrics.description: Percentage of leads with valid emails

key_metrics.name: Avg Domain Health
key_metrics.description: Average health score across active domains

common_questions: How many leads can we handle right now?
How many leads did we source this week?
Are we running low on Apollo credits?

dashboard_sections.title: Lead Pipeline
dashboard_sections.description: Leads sourced, validated, and ready for campaigns

dashboard_sections.title: Platform Status
dashboard_sections.description: PhantomBuster, Apollo, Apify health and limits

dashboard_sections.title: Domain Health
dashboard_sections.description: Active, warming, and resting domain status
